text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And T.M. Opera O finishes! She<n>couldn't prevail
against her sworn<n>rival, Admire Vega!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! How could this be?! Defeated<n>by my
nemesis after stoking out her<n>true potential...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I am yet radiant in tragedy! Am I<n>not, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That was merely part of the script. In<n>no way
whatsoever do I feel tragic!<n>I'm sure you
understand that.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Of course this isn't enough to faze<n>T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, Ayabe! I could hardly<n>believe that was
you running.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though I lost, your splendid display<n>made for a
great performance. What<n>was your motivation?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It was... what you told me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
After the Satsuki Sho, you told me to<n>face the
troubles within myself ...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's how I managed to concentrate<n>on my
running. And here is the result.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Now I know... I can handle the burden.<n>I can face
my destiny.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, so that was it.

How like me. Inadvertently<n>enlightening others
through casual<n>everyday conversation.

How about it, Ayabe? In the very<n>beginning, you
were reticent about<n>playing the part of my rival.

But now that you've lived it, are you<n>not filled with
satisfaction from the<n>residuals of my spotlight?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sure. I guess you could say it that<n>way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I can, as I have! You should puff out<n>your chest
and declare to the world<n>your newfound joy!
Haaah ha ha!
...Hehe.
Opera O is amazing...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ayabe really hated her... But now<n>she's laughing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But listen well! The opening bars<n>have only just
been sung.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With the first act of our classic year<n>coming to a
close this spring, the main<n>show is now set to
start!

For what lies ahead of us are the<n>senior year
races.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, Ayabe? With experience playing<n>my rival
under your belt, would you<n>join my side to take on
the<n>generation of yore?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes! Our sights will be set...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
On the Arima Kinen at this year's end!<n>Will you not
join me in ringing the bell<n>to start this generational
change?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Derby just ended, but T.M. Opera<n>O is already
fired up for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll... pass.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How could this be? It's unlike you to<n>be reluctant.
You must tell me why!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have two... One, that I'm not good<n>enough to beat
them yet.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And the other...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Keeping up with your antics is...<n>exhausting. I can't
take it around the<n>clock like this.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A-Ayabe?! Do not give up so easily!<n>You will
adapt, and soon enough this<n>will all be second
nature!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come back, Ayabe! Fly into my<n>bosom! Embrace
me wholeheartedly!<n>...Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's face turns bright red,<n>and she
books it straight out of here.<n>It must've been too
awkward for her<n>to handle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, shyness on that scale could be<n>an issue.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Such are her ways. She will surely<n>come around in
time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the spring Classic<n>finished, T.M.
Opera O charges<n>forward with newly fortified
strength<n>toward the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Nghhh... Opera O's rival...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Back then, if I had just done<n>something...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My worthy adversary is you, Doto,<n>the surprise
villain! Take my hand and<n>rise onto the stage!
Come, come!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: If I had taken her hand then, by now, I<n>would be...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Urghh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I wish I were stronger... So maybe<n>someday...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I could impress even Opera O!
